item.name: Beehive Souvenir Materials
item.description: As anyone who has had the dubious pleasure of visiting a seaside tourist trap can attest, the majority of the souvenirs sold are made from cheap and readily available materials, often found washed up on the shore along with the driftwood and dead jellyfish. The contents of this bag are─as is tradition─of similar ilk, clearly indicated by the dried seaweed with which most of the items are covered.
